hook.headline: This IG DM either gets a date… or blocked

reply.text: Im suing that dryer for getting more time with you than I do

messages.text: that helmet got vip access to your whole aura
yeah but it still signed a longer contract than me
cry about it to great clips or something
great clips could never handle main character settings like that
you talk like you got declined by supercuts too 😂
you are bold, i am still bored

no, that just screams frosted tips energy
ok but the dryer and i are in a situationship now

jokes on her im on 2 percent and vibes
that explains this whole lawsuit fantasy actually
ok i'm not done with you
